# bio

```
$ whoami
ishaan — developer, photographer, occasional breaker of things
```

> Software developer in Chicago. I build, break, then photograph what's left.

I build large-scale traffic management systems at [Parsons](https://www.parsons.com/), DevSecOps pipelines, build systems, and the kind of *bug-hunting* that happens before anyone files a ticket. Before that I spent time at [Anchorage Digital](https://www.anchorage.com/) working on **HSM deployment tracking, and code signing**, and [Purdue University](https://purdue.edu) getting my BS in CS.

My work tends to live where **systems** and **security** overlap: making fast things observable, and making observable things hard to abuse.

## off the clock

Behind a camera — landscapes, portraits, astro, long
exposures. `Sony a7IV` + `Sigma zooms`. I shoot for
**movement and time**: anything that asks the shutter
to stay open.

Travel when I can. Scuba whenever I'm near the ocean.
